nasb.text: Sing to the Lord, bless His name; Proclaim good tidings of His salvation from day to day.

esv.text: Sing to the Lord, bless his name; tell of his salvation from day to day.

cnv.text: 要向耶和華歌唱，稱頌他的名， 天天傳揚他的救恩。

ccb.text: 要向耶和华歌唱，称颂祂的名， 天天传扬祂的拯救之恩。

csbs.text: 你们当向耶和华歌唱，颂赞他的名， 日复一日地传扬他的救恩。
